feature_summary: security: symlink traversal in file APIs allows access outside worktree root - Fix via resolveAndValidateRealPath()
acceptance_criteria: Symlink rejection: A request with a path resolving through an external symlink is rejected with INVALID_PATH
Normal path preservation: Requests to normal paths continue to function correctly
Internal symlink preservation: Symlinks pointing within the worktreeRoot remain accessible
Image/video GET paths: Direct readFile() code paths for images and videos are protected via getWorktreeAndValidatePath()
Rename protection: renameFileOrDirectory() validates source path against symlink traversal
Tree API protection: GET /api/worktrees/:id/tree/:path rejects external symlink directories
Upload API protection: POST /api/worktrees/:id/upload/:path rejects external symlink paths
Create/upload with symlink parent: Creating or uploading through an external symlink parent is rejected
macOS tmpdir compatibility: Works when worktreeRoot contains OS-level symlinks (e.g., macOS /var -> /private/var)
Existing tests pass: All 4324 existing test cases continue to pass
New test coverage: 10 new cases in path-validator.test.ts + 9 cases in file-operations-symlink.test.ts
test_scenarios: Scenario 1: External symlink read via readFileContent() returns INVALID_PATH
Scenario 2: External symlink write via updateFileContent() returns INVALID_PATH
Scenario 3: External symlink delete via deleteFileOrDirectory() returns INVALID_PATH
Scenario 4: External symlink rename source via renameFileOrDirectory() returns INVALID_PATH
Scenario 5: External symlink directory for createFileOrDirectory() returns INVALID_PATH
Scenario 6: External symlink directory for writeBinaryFile() returns INVALID_PATH
Scenario 7: Internal symlink read via readFileContent() succeeds
Scenario 8: resolveAndValidateRealPath() correctly validates various symlink scenarios
Scenario 9: macOS tmpdir compatibility - rootDir with symlink resolves correctly
Scenario 10: Non-existent path ancestor traversal works correctly
